priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: Grayskull/secrets integration missing, security and reliability risk, silent secrets fetch failures at runtime, FLIPPI-3044 near-duplicate at P0 with 0.96 similarity
severity_justification: This bug involves Grayskull secrets management not being integrated into the Edison service, which is an explicit P0 signal per the triage ladder (security/secrets risk). The near-identical historical bug FLIPPI-3044 ('Grayskull Integration for Secrets in Edison') was also triaged P0 with 0.96 similarity, strongly confirming this classification. Silent runtime failures on secrets resolution (API keys, DB credentials) constitute an infra/security risk that cannot wait for a normal release cycle.
owner_reason: Vaibhav Walunj is the most frequent assignee on Edison-related tickets (FLIPPI-2025, FLIPPI-1914, FLIPPI-1916), suggesting ownership of the Edison service backend; FLIPPI-3044 itself is currently unassigned.
